history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person is taking a mirror selfie while holding a camera, with a green background and a small amount of visible text overlaid on the image.  

The main subject is a person with short dark hair and glasses, leaning in toward the camera and covering part of their face with one hand as they hold a camera in front of them.  

The setting appears to be indoors, shown by the mirror-like reflection and an indoor background with a green wall or backdrop. The lighting is soft and even, suggesting ambient indoor light. The camera is close to the person’s face, and the image is composed in a tight, close-up portrait framing.  

The person wears dark-framed glasses and has one hand near their cheek, with fingers positioned around their face. The camera lens is prominent in the foreground, and a hand is visible gripping the camera. The overall color palette includes green in the background and darker tones on the person and camera. There is also a colorful, rectangular overlay near the bottom of the image with stylized text, and a smaller line of text to the right.  

Visible Text:
“UHAK DIGITAL TITAN”
“@renaay oyya” (text on the right is unclear but appears similar to this)

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close mirror selfie of a person holding a camera. A green indoor background is visible, along with an overlaid banner containing stylized text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
